title: Vanilla Advanced
description: A high-performance shader meant to both look good and run on low-end computers! Might have some bugs on older GPUs. Feedback is appreciated!
body:
# Vanilla Advanced

I wanted a shader that both looked good and ran well on my potato computer... enjoy!

# Features

- Shadows
- Colored Shadows
- Volumetrics
- LabPBR Support
- Waving Foliage & Water


If you want to give feedback, ping me (@ThePlaneGuy45) in the shaderLABS discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/RpzWN9S

(note: not guaranteed to work on older GPUs or integrated graphics)
